details.productUrlName: Saurons Ransom Extended Art Surge Foil

customAttributes.description: Choose an opponent. They look at the top four cards of your library and separate them into a face-down pile and a face-up pile. Put one pile into your hand and the other into your graveyard. The Ring tempts you.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 11/3/2023. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText: "He was dear to you, I see. And now he shall endure the slow torment of years."
